title: VPN down for all staff
description: Nobody in our office can connect to the VPN client from remote. It keeps dropping.

title: Payroll inaccessible
description: I cannot access the payroll system to process this month's salary.

title: Need password reset
description: I forgot my active directory password and need it reset.

title: Blue screen of death
description: My laptop just crashed and shows a blue screen. It won't boot up anymore.

title: Executive cannot login
description: The CEO is unable to login to their computer before the board meeting.

title: Phishing email received
description: I received an email asking for my password from a suspicious sender.
